mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_category ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM forum_board WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY category_id ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM forum_board WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM forum_board WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_board SET thread_count = thread_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_board SET post_count = post_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
